content.en:
"Lord of the Fox Sun, this is the Golden Pole Dao Monument, the value is unimaginable, but it is not comparable to ordinary resources. You want us to let it out, that can't be!"

An Extreme Creature said coldly.

"You dare to do it here?" the Lord of the Fox Sun said coldly: "We are in a stalemate here, it is undoubtedly a waste of time, there are still many good things in Jimang Mountain, why bother!"

The other Extreme Creatures also knew that they couldn't do anything here, but they didn't want to leave, so they were very entangled.

Even if some Extreme Dao creatures are willing to give up, unless they all give up, the Lord of the Fox Sun will not give resources.

How is it possible to give up all of them?

As time passed, some Extreme Dao creatures couldn't bear it anymore, and they also felt that they had no hope of snatching the Golden Extreme Dao Monument, so they left directly.

Instead of wasting time here, you might as well go elsewhere to find resources, and if you're lucky, you'll be able to get a treasure comparable to the Golden Pole.

Distance.

A figure appeared, and it was Ye Tian.

"Golden Pole Dao Monument!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, he didn't expect to find a treasure similar to the Space-Time Extreme Dao Monument here.

If he obtained this Golden Extreme Dao Tablet, it would be much easier for him to cultivate and comprehend the Golden Extreme Dao!

Of course, even if he can't snatch it, he can use the ability to copy all things in the future to copy the Golden Pole Dao Monument.

"It's better to grab it, so that you can comprehend the Golden Pole Dao Monument and the Time and Space Pole Monument at the same time, and the Golden Pole Dao Monument can also be brought into the Wudao Tower, which will greatly improve the strength of the Wudao Tower in the future, and can even cultivate a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm who has realized the Golden Extreme Dao. Ye Tian said darkly.

Therefore, he must snatch this golden pole monument.

But once you do it, it's easy to attract extreme power.

"According to what I know, only a very small number of Infinite Realm Perfect Controllers can compete with each other without dying, and most of the Infinite Realm Perfect Controllers can't stop it, let alone super perfect controllers. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And whether he can stop it, he doesn't know.

But it doesn't matter, he can make a copy of a body, so it doesn't matter if he falls.

Moreover, they will not reveal their identities, at most they think that the real body has entered the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, and it is the will clone that has fallen.

Swish!

Ye Tian evacuated from here, preparing to find a safe place to replicate his body and come here again.

Anyway, the Golden Pole Dao Monument can't be included in the Void Treasure, so it can only be carried around, and it is easy to identify.

Moreover, these Extreme Creatures are still in a stalemate, and it is impossible to break the deadlock for the time being.

So, he had plenty of time to prepare.

......

"The Endless Lord has just arrived!"

Some of the Extreme Creatures frowned.

I have to say that they are extremely wary of the Endless Lord, because this one's strength is too terrifying.

However, this is Jimang Mountain, and the Endless Lord is afraid that he will not dare to make a move.

"Forget it, he probably gave up, and he didn't dare to compete with so many of our Extreme Path creatures, otherwise there would really be a few Extreme Path creatures desperately attacking him, triggering the power of Extreme Mang, and he might really die!"

Therefore, they did not intercept Ye Tian.

Time passes slowly.

Not long after, Ye Tian had already copied a replica body, and this replica body immediately went to the place where the Golden Extreme Dao Monument of Extreme Mangshan was located.

This time, he wants to really make a move and snatch the Golden Pole Dao Monument.

"The Infinity Lord is here again!"

The Lord of the Fox Sun frowned.

Could it be that Ye Tian, the Lord of Endless, has not given up the Golden Extreme Dao Monument yet, but does Ye Tian dare to make a move?

"The Endless Lord is here again, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace can give an order to kill him at all costs, which Extreme Dao creature is willing to sacrifice himself and die with him? If you want to kill him outside the Extreme Mang Mountain, the price to pay is too great, it is said that thousands of Extreme Dao creatures are not his opponents, at least tens of thousands of Extreme Dao creatures are needed. And here, an Extreme Path creature can hope to die with him!"

The Lord of the Fox Sun said.

"Lord of the Fox Sun, why don't you die with him?"

Another Extreme Dao creature said coldly.

Fight like Kilkenny cats?

Who wants that?

Although they all knew that sacrificing an Extreme Dao creature to kill Ye Tian was the best decision, no Extreme Dao creature was willing to do so!

After all, they only have one life, but Ye Tian has two lives!

Of course, a very small number of Extreme Path creatures have special talents, so they have clones, but the fall of the clones is also very costly.

And such an extreme creature will almost never reveal its ability to have a clone.

And whether there is such an extreme creature here, it's hard to say, and even if there is, it is impossible to stand up.

At this moment, Ye Tian instantly crossed over, aiming directly at the Golden Extreme Dao Monument.

"Look for death!"

One of the Extremes creatures was furious.

They didn't attack Ye Tian, but Ye Tian dared to directly snatch the Golden Extreme Dao Monument, did they really dare not make a move?

In an instant, these extreme creatures intercepted in front of Ye Tian.

However, they didn't make a move, and they waited for Ye Tian to make a move.

If Ye Tian dares to make a move, then let's die together.

They didn't believe that Ye Tian dared to make a move, after all, according to what they knew, Ye Tian had obtained an unknown number of resources in his hands, and his net worth was higher than that of some Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers at the End of the Realm.

Once the will clone falls, Ye Tian's loss will be too great.

Therefore, they didn't think that Ye Tian really dared to make a move.

"Hahaha, you think I don't dare to do it?"

Ye Tian secretly sneered.

Rumble!!!

The space-time Polar Dao domain erupted, covering one Extreme Dao creature after another.

Ye Tian didn't care about the power, but covered this area as much as possible.

Instantly, the power exploded, covering all the Extreme Creatures.

At this moment, all the Extreme Dao creatures were stunned.

Ye Tian actually made a move!

Bang!!!!

The power of the white extreme light appeared, and a blow pierced Ye Tian's body, but Ye Tian did not die, and his many life-saving abilities allowed him to survive.

Compared to Ye Tian, other Extreme Dao creatures were not attacked by the power of Extreme Mang.

But the other Extreme Dao creatures were weak, so they were shattered by the power of the Extreme Dao one by one and turned into countless fragments.

In the blink of an eye, all those weaker Extreme Dao creatures were killed, and only a very small number of extremely powerful Extreme Dao creatures survived by relying on the secret treasure.

"Let's go!"

They don't dare to stay here anymore.

Otherwise, if Ye Tian attacked again, they wouldn't survive.

What made them even more horrified was that Ye Tian had at least a hundred times more power than them, or even more, and in such a situation, Ye Tian had not even died.

It's horrible!

"I ran away, I thought you were going to fight hard!"

Ye Tian sneered.

In an instant, his body became extremely large, and he held this Golden Extreme Dao Monument as a toy in his hand.

I can't collect the Void Treasure, so I can only hold it like this.

He did not go out immediately, but silently healed.

In Jimang Mountain, he is very safe, if he goes out, those extreme Dao creatures are afraid that they will all attack him, and they will not let him leave with the Golden Extreme Dao Monument.

Therefore, in the following years, his replica body stayed in Jimang Mountain until Jimang Mountain closed.

At the same time, the news that Ye Tian had obtained the Golden Extreme Dao Monument spread among the Extreme Dao creatures, but there were no Extreme Dao creatures attacking Ye Tian, just waiting for the moment when Ye Tian left the Extreme Mang Mountain, and they attacked him together.

The time for Jimang Mountain to open will not be very long, so Ye Tian must come out.
